label: Content Features
description: Objective, verifiable structural or presentational features physically or formally present in the work.

tags.definition: A list of sources cited or consulted by the author
Data visualizations included as part of the work
A set of questions for group discussion, typically at the end of the work
Narrative constructed from letters, diary entries, documents, or other found records
Supplementary notes appearing at the bottom of pages or end of chapters/work
A story-within-a-story: an outer narrative that contains the central tale
A defined list of specialized terms used in the work
Black and white drawings, engravings, or artwork within the text
Full-color artwork, photographs, or plates within the text
An alphabetical index of names, subjects, or concepts with page references
Geographic or world maps included as part of the work
Two or more distinct first-person or close-third-person narrative voices
Chapters or sections are not arranged in chronological order
Practice problems, exercises, or activities for the reader to complete
Narrated in the second person ('you do X')
A structured listing of chapters or sections with page numbers
Written in verse, or in prose with significant poetic/lyrical structure
